reasoning: The PCI DSS control 1.2.1 focuses on restricting public access and ensuring secure network configurations, which maps directly to Kubernetes NetworkPolicies and service configurations. NetworkPolicies can enforce default deny rules for ingress and egress traffic, preventing unauthorized access. Additionally, ensuring services are not exposed via NodePort and that Ingress resources have TLS enabled aligns with the requirement to control and secure network access.
title: Requirement 1.2.1
